title: TigreSoto Calaca
description: Texture for any pvp mode and any version.
body: A texture focused on pvp and it does not matter what mode you play since it contains enough overlays to be comfortable in all modes, it is made with a skull theme, both the netherite sword and the diamond sword, the gap is also set, the crossbow and the shield are with a comfortable overlay (reduced) any questions you can ask on my yt or tiktok where I appear as tigresoto1
